message:
feat(memory_budget): add operational telemetry counters [ft-3kxe.24]

Add MemoryBudgetTelemetry with AtomicU64 counters tracking
panes_registered, panes_unregistered, samples, and
samples_with_pressure. Includes proptest suite with 12 unit
tests + 5 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
